name: Store Types
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can categorize different outlet formats by configuring store types that distinguish between retail stores, warehouses, franchises, or other location categories within your "}, {"text": "Retail Express", "bold": true}, {"text": " system. Properly configured store types help organize multi-location operations and enable appropriate reporting, inventory management, and operational workflow distinctions based on location purpose and business model."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Setting up store types aligned with your actual retail operations structure helps distinguish between customer-facing stores, distribution centers, and other location types for better operational management and reporting accuracy."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The Store Types feature allows you to allocate a specific Store Type to your Outlet/s to better manage your inventory, reporting and visibility across the business as a whole."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For companies that manage an array of retail, online, wholesale operations and distribution /warehouse centres, this is an efficient way to separate and provide distinction across the different sectors of the business, and many reports can be filtered by Store Type."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "The available Store Types are pre-configured and not currently able to be edited."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Configure a Store Type:"}], "data-id": "configure-a-store-type"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To assign a Store Type to your Outlet:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Navigate to: "}, {"text": "Settings > Locations / Outlets > Outlets", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Edit", "bold": true}, {"text": " (pencil) icon to edit your Outlet information"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select the required "}, {"text": "Store Type", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppiDtEAI.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppiDtEAI.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "mceclip0 - 2023-07-10T021046.325.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Save", "bold": true}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Using Store Type filtering within reports"}], "data-id": "using-store-type-filtering-within-reports"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The Store Types filter is available across a range of existing reports, including:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Sales Report"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Inventory Movement Log"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Item Detail Export"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Gross Profits Report"}]}]}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Store Types are not mandatory. However, if you do not assign a Store Type to an Outlet, you will not be able to apply Store Type filters within reports."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
